question: How do I replace the camera's date/time battery?
content:
The date/time back-up battery is a CR2016 lithium battery. Replacing it resets the date/time setting, so set the correct date/time afterward.
1. Turn the power switch to <OFF>.
2. Open the cover and remove the battery pack.<PIC>
3. Take out the date/time battery holder.<PIC>
4. Install the new CR2016 in the holder with the correct + and - orientation.<PIC>
5. Close the cover.<PIC>
ret:
"The date/time back-up battery is a CR2016 lithium battery. Replacing it resets the date/time setting, so set the correct date/time afterward.
1. Turn the power switch to <OFF>.
2. Open the cover and remove the battery pack.<PIC>
3. Take out the date/time battery holder.<PIC>
4. Install the new CR2016 in the holder with the correct + and - orientation.<PIC>
5. Close the cover.<PIC>",["Manual10_46", "Manual10_47", "Manual10_48", "Manual10_49"]

evidence_refs.note: Date/time battery section; CR2016 lithium battery, reset behavior, and power switch off.
Replacement steps and adjacent image anchors for opening the cover, removing the holder, orienting the new battery, and closing the cover.
Confirms the date/time battery type is CR2016 lithium.

notes: All four images are adjacent to distinct physical replacement steps; <PIC> count matches the images array.
